title: 1.15ify - Base
description: Restores assets to their 1.15.2 or earliest versions.
body:
Replaces some default assets with their 1.15.2 versions, or their earliest available version after 1.15.2, including snapshots. It also edits some post-1.15 textures to fit the style of earlier versions, such as the deepslate ores and smithing table UI. This pack goes down to the smallest details, such as missing subtitles, old block sounds, capitalization differences, and even re-introducing a translation string bug. It also replaces the music events, removing all the new overworld and nether tracks.

This resource pack is currently incomplete. So far, I have gone through the listed changes of every 1.16 and 1.17 snapshot.

## Usage
Place this pack above Default and below everything else.

This resource pack also makes use of custom entity models and random textures for the Zombified Piglins. For the best experience, you should use mods that implement OptiFine's CEM and random entity textures.

## Addons
- [Netherite Fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/1.15ify-netherite-fix): Fixes holes in the netherite sword and boots items.

## Known Issues
- Some netherite tool/armor textures have missing sides on their item model. This was an issue with the old textures and is fixed in the Netherite Fix addon.
- Minecraft logo is not replaced with its 1.15 version. It's currently using the 1.16 version, but I want to try to see how I can convert the 1.15 logo to the latest version.

## Credits
- Mojang: Assets; panorama picture and font used for the thumbnail.
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net): Providing some assets. See VT Selected Packs.txt for info on what's included.
